records.sourceExcerpt: Three million weekly Codex users. Usage limits were reset, with a commitment to repeat resets for every additional million users up to 10M.
records.description: Three million weekly Codex users. Usage limits were reset, with a commitment to repeat resets for every additional million users up to 10M.
records.verificationNotes: Official announcement. The canonical event timestamp is the announcement time.

dataProvenance.notes: Canonical record mapped without X or LLM calls.

records.sourceExcerpt: Codex reached four million active users and another rate-limit reset was announced.
records.description: Codex reached four million active users and another rate-limit reset was announced.
records.verificationNotes: Official announcement. The canonical event timestamp is the announcement time.

dataProvenance.notes: Canonical record mapped without X or LLM calls.

records.sourceExcerpt: Five million users milestone. Tibo announced that limits would be reset the following morning.
records.description: Five million users milestone. Tibo announced that limits would be reset the following morning.

records.sourceExcerpt: Seven million active users. One banked reset was added to each eligible account.
